mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, ru.nickname as reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, ru.nickname as reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.status = #{status} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, ru.nickname as reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND (c.status = 2 OR (c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 1)) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, ru.nickname as reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (article_id, user_id, content, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, status, created_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = #{status}

SELECT c.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, ru.nickname as reply_to_user_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.status = #{status} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.username as user_username, ru.nickname as reply_to_user_name, a.title as article_title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id LEFT JOIN article a ON c.article_id = a.id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE status = #{status}
